Global Variable# kDNSServiceFlagsBrowseDomains

iOS 10.0+iPadOS 10.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.12+tvOS 10.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 3.0+

```
var kDNSServiceFlagsBrowseDomains: UInt32 { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/dnssd/kDNSServiceFlagsBrowseDomains#Discussion)

Enumerates domains recommended for browsing. Used for specifying domain enumeration type in DNSServiceEnumerateDomains.
